title: Most Used App
tagline: Find the most frequently used app using counting
realWorld:
App Usage Analytics

Used in analytics systems to determine the most frequently used application by users for insights and recommendations.
description: Given a list of app names, determine which app is used the most. This can be solved by counting the frequency of each app.
statement: Given an array apps, return the app that appears more than ⌊n/2⌋ times. You may assume that the majority element always exists in the array. For example: - ["chat", "music", "chat"] -> "chat" - ["video", "video", "music", "video"] -> "video"
